## Meeting Purpose

[To guide Feyisayo through the Airby Article Refresher workflow and troubleshoot Surfer SEO scoring inconsistencies.](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Airby Article Refresher workflow involves using AROPS, ChatGPT, and Surfer SEO to update and optimize content](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Inconsistent Surfer SEO scores (30, 72, 91) for the same content caused confusion; using the highest score (91) is recommended](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [H2/H3 tag inconsistencies when copying content between platforms can affect Surfer SEO scores](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Keywords for article optimization are sourced from the URL and Surfer SEO suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Airby Article Refresher Workflow

  - [Use AROPS to generate initial content based on URL and keyword](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Copy output to ChatGPT for refinement and proper article formatting](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
  - [Add keywords from Surfer SEO to ChatGPT for further optimization](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Aim for \~2000 words (varies by client; Airbyte has in-depth articles)](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Copy final content to Surfer SEO, aiming for a score of 80+](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Make final adjustments (add sections, fix headers) to reach the target score](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Transfer optimized content to Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Surfer SEO Scoring Inconsistencies

  - [Same content yielded vastly different scores: 30, 72, and 91](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [Possible causes:](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [H2/H3 tag inconsistencies when copying between platforms](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Surfer SEO's internal algorithm fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Solution: Use the highest score (91) and proceed with optimization](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)

### Keyword Selection and Usage

  - [Primary keyword found at the end of the article URL](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Additional keywords sourced from Surfer SEO suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Copy all relevant keywords into the AROPS "refresh instructions"](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Use ChatGPT to incorporate missing keywords naturally into the content](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)

### Content Length Considerations

  - [Airbyte articles tend to be in-depth](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Aim for \~2000 words, but adjust based on original article length and topic depth](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [4000+ words may be too long; compare with original article length](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Feyisayo to continue practicing the Airby Article Refresher workflow](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Use the highest Surfer SEO score (91) as the starting point for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1130.0)
  - [Double-check H2/H3 tags when transferring content between platforms](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Review the shared recording for workflow clarification](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [Reach out to Tiandra for any additional questions or assistance](https://fathom.video/share/skwBE_BV_cR_EB1sNN6ucW2ipJKX6xAF?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
